title: Queue Split Design Playbook
description: Document every split/skill: queue name, ASA goal, priority, group, hours. Route before you forecast.

mindset.principle: Backend support is structure. Queues are the skeleton.

mistakes.label: Single queue for mixed customer tiers
mistakes.cost: High-margin accounts wait with low-priority noise

mistakes.label: Priority only in supervisor heads
mistakes.cost: New hires mis-route; ASA goals become fiction

mistakes.label: After-hours promise without split rule
mistakes.cost: Abandon spikes; CSAT hits answer survey first

decision_branches.situation: New SKU or service needs route
Calls after close with no path

agent_signal.use_when: Call routing is tribal knowledge. Mixed tiers in one queue. ASA goals undocumented or wrong.
decision_criteria: One registry row per split before forecast work.
Priority and ASA goal on every row.
agent_signal.operator_context: Queue map is prerequisite for volume tracking and staffing math.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops: fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Call routing is tribal knowledge. Mixed tiers in one queue. ASA goals undocumented or wrong.
Need playbook: Queue Split Design Playbook
